case_title: FERRARI PHILIPPE VS ALIOTO FRANK C/O OWNER ALIOTOS GARAGE AUTO REPAIR et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FERRARI PHILIPPE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO FRANK C/O OWNER ALIOTOS GARAGE AUTO REPAIR PIAZZA  LAWRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO FRANK C/O OWNER ALIOTOS GARAGE AUTO REPAIR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERRARI PHILIPPE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALIOTO FRANK C/O OWNER ALIOTOS GARAGE AUTO REPAIR PIAZZA  LAWRENCE DEFT PIAZZA APPEARED AND WAIVED ALL IRREGULARITIES IN BEING ADDED AS A DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
